title: Per-project skill sync: <repo>/.claude/skills + <repo>/.agents/skills default, --global-skills opt-in
action: Parameterize computeSkillSync (~:565-731) by target root; run the skill-sync stage over per-target roots: default = <repo>/.claude/skills AND <repo>/.agents/skills; --global-skills adds/uses ~/.claude/skills (old behavior; global root untouched otherwise). Turn the four singular skills payload sites (plan ~:1788, blocked-apply ~:1827, applied ~:1862, recheck_skills ~:1859) into a per-target collection skills.targets[{kind,target_root,mode,blocked,versions,items}]. Preserve: D2 forced-apply transparency per target, D5 recheck blocked-first precedence aggregated across all targets, unknown-version refusal per target. Overlap guard: exempt exactly the two managed in-repo roots from the repo-contains-target refusal; keep all other refusals. Self-onboard noop: skip per-project targets iff realpath(sourceRoot) is equal to or inside realRepo (beegog case) - global sync stays available there. Never write .gitignore entries for the trees (D4: committed). Update bee-hive SKILL.md onboarding section for the new payload shape. Tests: fresh host onboard populates both in-repo roots (15 bee-*); re-run up_to_date; drift in one root -> sync_skill for that root only; --global-skills targets fake home; source-checkout self-onboard skips per-project sync; repo-inside-global-target still refuses.

truths: A fresh host onboard --apply materializes bee-* skills under BOTH <repo>/.claude/skills and <repo>/.agents/skills
Without --global-skills, ~/.claude/skills is never written or deleted
beegog self-onboard never copies skills into its own .claude/skills or .agents/skills
Recheck can never read up_to_date while any target is blocked (D5 across targets)
All 292 lib tests and all onboard tests pass

trace.outcome: Per-project skill sync landed: computeSkillSync parameterized per target root; defaults <repo>/.claude/skills + <repo>/.agents/skills, --global-skills opt-in restores ~/.claude/skills; four singular skills payload sites became skills.targets[{kind,target_root,mode,blocked,versions,items}] with blocked-first aggregation (D5), per-target forced-apply transparency (D2), unknown never forceable; in-repo roots exempt from repo-contains-target refusal (with a fail-closed symlink-escape guard), every other refusal kept; self-onboard skips per-project targets as mode self_skip; no gitignore entries for the trees (D4); SKILL.md onboarding payload docs updated
trace.verify_output: 404 ok checks; PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (case-alias env skip, also verified green with BEE_CASE_FS_DIR=/mnt/c/tmp: failures: 0, skipped: 0); test_lib: 292 passed, 0 failed
